'''tachaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathermaker|feathermaker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathermaker|feathermaker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tachaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæchæzæth|tæchæzæth]] || [[word:tæchæzæj|tæchæzæj]] || [[word:tæchæzæsh|tæchæzæsh]] || [[word:tæchæzæ|tæchæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachachazath|tachachazath]] || [[word:tachachazaj|tachachazaj]] || [[word:tachachazash|tachachazash]] || [[word:tachachaza|tachachaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachazath|tachazath]] || [[word:tachazaj|tachazaj]] || [[word:tachazash|tachazash]] || [[word:tachaza|tachaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachafzath|tachafzath]] || [[word:tachafzaj|tachafzaj]] || [[word:tachafzash|tachafzash]] || [[word:tachafzaf|tachafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tachazatha|tachazatha]] || [[word:tachazaja|tachazaja]] || [[word:tachazasha|tachazasha]] || [[word:tachazaka|tachazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tachazath|tachazath]] || [[word:tachazaj|tachazaj]] || [[word:tachazash|tachazash]] || [[word:tachaza|tachaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tachazathal|tachazathal]] || [[word:tachazajal|tachazajal]] || [[word:tachazashal|tachazashal]] || [[word:tachazakal|tachazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tachazathatha|tachazathatha]] || [[word:tachazajaja|tachazajaja]] || [[word:tachazashasha|tachazashasha]] || [[word:tachazaka|tachazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tachazathan|tachazathan]] || [[word:tachazajan|tachazajan]] || [[word:tachazashan|tachazashan]] || [[word:tachazakan|tachazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tachazathaoro|tachazathaoro]] || [[word:tachazajaoro|tachazajaoro]] || [[word:tachazashaoro|tachazashaoro]] || [[word:tachazakaoro|tachazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
